ddls:
CREATE TABLE "processing_stages" (
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each processing stage */,
  "stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the processing stage */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the processing stage */,
  "stage_order" INTEGER /* Order of the stage in the processing workflow */,
  "default_template_id" INTEGER /* Default template associated with the stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_processing_stages_default_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("default_template_id") REFERENCES templates ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the template */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the template usage */,
  "template_type" TEXT /* Type of template (e.g., MD topology, QM settings) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "semi_empirical_qm" (
  "qm0_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for semi-empirical QM settings */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the processing stage */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the template used */,
  "energy_minimization" TEXT /* Details on energy minimization methods */,
  "charges_derived_from" TEXT /* Type of charge derivation used */,
  "basis_set" TEXT /* Basis set used for calculations */,
  "spin_multiplicity" INTEGER /* Spin multiplicity of the molecule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qm0_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_semi_empirical_qm_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_id") REFERENCES processing_stages ("stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_semi_empirical_qm_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES templates ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dft_qm" (
  "qm1_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for DFT settings */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the processing stage */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the template used */,
  "dft_level" TEXT /* DFT level of theory applied */,
  "energy_minimization" TEXT /* Details on energy minimization methods */,
  "exchange_correlation_functional" TEXT /* Exchange-correlation functional used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qm1_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dft_qm_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES templates ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dft_qm_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_id") REFERENCES processing_stages ("stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dft_hessian_qm" (
  "qm2_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for Hessian settings */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the processing stage */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the template used */,
  "hessian_method" TEXT /* Method used for Hessian calculations */,
  "frequencies" TEXT /* Calculated frequencies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qm2_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dft_hessian_qm_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_id") REFERENCES processing_stages ("stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dft_hessian_qm_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES templates ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "default_limits" (
  "limit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the size limit */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the processing stage */,
  "default_size_limit" INTEGER /* Default size limit for atoms */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the limit's application */,
  "molecule_type" TEXT /* Type of molecule (e.g., protein, ligand) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("limit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_default_limits_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_id") REFERENCES processing_stages ("stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_md_topology" (
  "topology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MD topology entry */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the processing stage */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the MD topology */,
  "molecule_type" TEXT /* Type of molecule (e.g., protein, ligand) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topology_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_md_topology_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_id") REFERENCES processing_stages ("stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charge_derivation" (
  "charge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for charge derivation */,
  "qm0_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the semi-empirical QM settings */,
  "method" TEXT /* Charge derivation method used */,
  "charge_type" TEXT /* Type of charge (e.g., partial, formal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("charge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charge_derivation_qm0_id FOREIGN KEY ("qm0_id") REFERENCES semi_empirical_qm ("qm0_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation result */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the simulation */,
  "qm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to either semi-empirical, DFT or Hessian QM settings */,
  "result_data" TEXT /* Result data from the simulation */,
  "simulation_date" TEXT /* Date the simulation was performed */,
  "simulation_time" TEXT /* Time the simulation was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "molecules" (
  "molecule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each molecule */,
  "molecule_name" TEXT /* Name of the molecule */,
  "molecule_type" TEXT /* Type of molecule (e.g., protein, ligand) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("molecule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_molecules" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the simulation result */,
  "molecule_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the molecule used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_molecules_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES simulation_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_molecules_molecule_id FOREIGN KEY ("molecule_id") REFERENCES molecules ("molecule_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each processing stage
Order of the stage in the processing workflow
Default template associated with the stage
Type of template (e.g., MD topology, QM settings)
Unique identifier for semi-empirical QM settings
Unique identifier for the size limit
Unique identifier for each MD topology entry
Reference to the semi-empirical QM settings
Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin)
Unique identifier for each simulation result
Reference to the user who performed the simulation
Reference to either semi-empirical, DFT or Hessian QM settings
